positive: A majestic, stylized woodland creature silhouette, like a mythical fox or wolf, sitting at a mystical glowing campfire surrounded by stylized floral elements and ferns. The style should be graphic, highly detailed linework with strong black silhouettes against a muted, earthy, gradient background (sage green, burnt orange, deep indigo). Emphasize high contrast and clean outlines suitable for screen printing on apparel. The composition must be central and symmetrical. Inspired by Art Nouveau and modern folk illustration, with a focus on clear, positive space and negative space contrast. Golden hour ambient glow emanating from the fire.
negative: blur, text, watermarks, low detail, grainy, artifacts, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, extra limbs, copyright, logo, trademark, celebrity, messy, noise
